SQLLite.SQL: SELECT OT.order_id as "OrderId" , OT.display_order_id as "DisplayOrderId" , OT.previous_order_id as "PreviousOrderId" , OT.order_description as "OrderDescription" , OT.legal_description as "LegalDescription" , OT.document_type as "DocumentType" , OT.report_type as "ReportType" , OT.module_name as "ModuleName" , OT.module_group as "ModuleGroup" , OT.selection_criteria as "SelectionCriteria" , OT.doc_recipient as "DocumentRecipient" , OT.doc_payee as "DocumentPayee" , OT.printer_type as "PrinterType" , OT.user_edit as "UserEdit" , OT.file_prefix as "FilePrefix" , OT.file_extension as "FileExtension" FROM ORDER_TYPES OT WHERE OT.ORDER_ID = ${param.orderType}

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin
